channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: SEC, Big Ten officials to meet this week on College Football Playoff expansion, format changes
item.description: There has been just one season of the 12-team College Football Playoff, yet officials from the most powerful conferences are ready to expand the event.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Blue Jays, Vladimir Guerrero Jr fail to reach long-term contract extension ahead of spring training
item.description: The Toronto Blue Jays and Vladimir Guerrero Jr. failed to a reach a long-term contract extension on Monday, setting the slugger up to hit free agency at the end of the season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees' Aaron Judge disagrees with Juan Soto's belief that Mets give him best chance to win title
item.description: New York Yankees superstar Aaron Judge disagreed with Juan Soto's belief that New York Mets are better positioned to win than the Yankees during a press conference on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Diamondbacks, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo agree to $45 million, 4-year deal that starts in 2026
item.description: Slick-fielding shortstop Geraldo Perdomo has agreed to a $45 million, four-year contract with the Arizona Diamondbacks that begins in 2026. The deal announced Tuesday includes a club option for 2030.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tobe Awaka has a double-double as No. 19 Arizona snaps 2-game skid with a 74-67 win at Baylor
item.description: Tobe Awaka had 14 points and 12 rebounds as No. 19 Arizona moved into second place alone in the Big 12 Conference with a 74-67 win at Baylor.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Notre Dame moves up to No. 1 in AP poll for first time since 2019 after UCLA suffers 1st loss
item.description: Notre Dame is the new No. 1 in The Associated Press Top 25 women's basketball poll, ascending to the top spot Monday for the first time since 2019. The Fighting Irish replaced UCLA, which lost its first game of the season last week, falling to rival USC, 71-60. Notre Dame was last No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: LAFC, France national team star Olivier Giroud has $500K in watches stolen from home
item.description: LAFC and France national team star Olivier Giroud reportedly had around $500,000 in watches stolen from his home during a burglary in February.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bregman's $120 million, 3-year deal with Red Sox includes $60 million deferred, paid from 2035-46
item.description: Alex Bregman could receive the final payment of his $120 million, three-year deal with the Boston Red Sox in 2046. His deal, announced Saturday, calls for the $5 million signing bonus to be paid on Jan. 15, 2028, according to contract details obtained by The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles player declines actor’s offer to pay Super Bowl fine
item.description: Actor and Eagles fan Rob McElhenny, best known for co-creating and starring in FXX’s “It’s Always Sunny in Philadelphia,” had recently offered to foot the bill for a fine incurred by Eagles player Jalyx Hunt during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WGN 9

item.title: Auburn stays at No. 1 in AP Top 25 for 6th straight week, Florida up to No. 2; Louisville returns
item.description: Auburn's win at Alabama assured the Tigers would keep the No. 1 ranking in The Associated Press Top 25 men's college basketball poll for a sixth consecutive week.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC nabs first win in preseason match, debuts new jersey
item.description: San Diego FC took its first win in a preseason friendly match against the New York Red Bulls on Saturday, less than a day after the club unveiled its secondary "Community Kit" in the lead up to the team's highly-anticipated debut.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Angels star Mike Trout moving from center to right field in hopes of staying more healthy
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Angels oft-injured star Mike Trout is moving from center to right field in hopes of better preserving his health. The three-time AL MVP played in 82 or fewer games in three of the past four seasons while dealing with an assortment of injuries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dion Jordan, former highly touted NFL prospect, owns up to failed success at pro level
item.description: Former top draft pick Dion Jordan spoke out about his struggles in his NFL career and his failing to mature as a player when he was with the Miami Dolphins.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shaw performs Black Power salute after goal for Man City Women following racist abuse
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Khadija ‘Bunny’ Shaw bowed her head and raised a gloved fist after scoring a goal on her first start for Manchester City Women since pulling out of the team because of racist abuse directed at her on social media.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz fall to Clippers in final game before All-Star break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Norman Powell scored a season-high 41 points and James Harden added 32 to lift the Los Angeles Clippers to a 120-116 overtime victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night. Harden also had 10 rebounds, seven assists and three steals.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: JuJu Watkins, No. 6 USC hand No. 1 UCLA its first loss of the season
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins broke out of a scoring slump with 38 points, helping sixth-ranked Southern California topple No. 1 UCLA 71-60 and further delivering on her goal of restoring the program to its earlier glory.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: CMU Men's Wrestling "Battle in Brownson" recap
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) —Western Colorado Tops Colorado Mesa in ‘Battle in Brownson’ In a heated rivalry matchup inside Brownson Arena, the Colorado Mesa Mavericks faced off against the Western Colorado Mountaineers in the annual Battle in Brownson.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Study finds Bears fans most heartbroken in the NFL
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — In Chicago, sports and heartbreak go hand-in-hand. The Bears just went 5-12 when ahead of the season, they had playoff aspirations. The Bulls are fresh off back-to-back demolitions from the Detroit Pistons and embarking on a rebuild heading into the NBA all-star break.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Meet Colorado's top scorer: Olathe junior Isaiah Gordon
item.description: No player in the entire state of Colorado scores more points per game than Olathe junior Isaiah Gordon.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: WATCH: Jed Hoyer reacts after Alex Bregman passes over Cubs, signs with Red Sox, according to reports
item.description: NOTE: In the attached video from spring training, Cubs President Jed Hoyer discusses missing out on a bid to sign All-Star third baseman Alex Bregman in free agency. Click to watch.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Tems joins San Diego FC ownership group
item.description: On Wednesday, SDFC announced two-time Grammy Award-winning and Oscar nominated singer-songwriter Tems has joined the ownership group as a club partner.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Funeral service held for Virginia McCaskey
item.description: A private funeral service will be held for Virginia Halas McCaskey, the 102-year-old owner of the Chicago Bears, after a public memorial service held in Des Plaines on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Winnie Dortch, WGN 9
